text.title: clean-architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the clean-architecture methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-bounded-context
step.action: Name the bounded context + the entities/use-cases inside.

step.name: scaffold-layers
step.action: Create 4 layer folders + interface stubs + entity stubs.

step.name: write-use-cases
step.action: Implement use cases that orchestrate entities via interfaces.

step.name: author-import-linter-contract
step.action: Configure import-linter (or ArchUnit) with inward-only rule.
step.decision-gate: If CI cannot run the contract, do not ship — architecture tests are mandatory.

step.name: wire-composition-root
step.action: Compose dependencies at the entry point (main / wsgi).
